housing.header_desc: Whether you are looking for social connection or complete privacy, Co-Match offers various housing forms that suit your life stage.

cohousing.title: Cohousing / Shared Living
cohousing.desc: A room in a shared home or project where you live with like-minded people.

hospita.title: Homestay / Lodging
hospita.desc: Living with a private landlord who also resides in the property.

vakantie.title: Holiday Home / Sublet
vakantie.desc: A home available for temporary rent for a fixed period (minimum 1 month).

huisbewaring.title: House Sitting / Expat
huisbewaring.desc: Home for a longer period (6+ months) due to temporary departure of the owner.

vrij.title: Regular Rental
vrij.desc: A self-contained home rented out regularly for an indefinite period.

feat.matching.desc: Goes beyond just rent price. We match on lifestyle, values, and personal preferences to guarantee the ideal match.

feat.verified.desc: Low barrier, easy to use and completely risk-free. Low costs for seekers, always free for providers.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Co-Match. Intentional Living. All rights reserved.
footer.mission: The platform for intentional living and cohousing. Together we make living personal again.
footer.modal_content: This page is currently under development. You will find more information about this topic here soon.
footer.prices_content:
With Co-Match you only pay for what you actually need. No expensive monthly subscriptions, but flexible control with credits.

To unlock all information from a property provider, you pay a one-time fee of {{credits}} credits.

**Why do we do this?**
- **Quality over quantity:** It prevents people from randomly 'spamming' hundreds of properties, which overflows providers with unserious inquiries.
- **Mutual commitment:** By raising a small barrier, providers instantly know you are genuinely interested. This leads to a much higher chance of receiving a real match and reply.
- **All-in-one access:** With these {{credits}} credits, you unlock the provider's contact details, the deep AI match report, and a secure chat space to get in touch.
footer.newsletter_desc: Receive monthly updates on new communities and tips.
footer.safety.intro: At Co-Match, your safety and privacy are our top priorities. We have built our platform so you can search for your new home or the ideal roommate with peace of mind.
footer.safety.p1.title: No Private Data Exposed
footer.safety.p1.desc: We do not record unnecessary private data. Only when there is a mutual match and you decide to share this via the secure chat will this information reach the other person.
footer.safety.p2.title: No Data Exchange without Your Control
footer.safety.p2.desc: There is no automatic exchange of personal data between seekers and providers. You are at the helm.
footer.safety.p3.title: Your Data is Not for Sale
footer.safety.p3.desc: We never sell your data to third parties. Only if you explicitly give permission for our partner network can we put you in touch.
footer.safety.trust.title: The Trust Ladder
footer.safety.trust.desc: To prevent fraud, we work with a unique Trust Level system (1 to 4) for housing providers.
footer.safety.trust.l1.title: Standard
footer.safety.trust.l2.title: Professional
footer.safety.trust.l2.desc: Linked to a professional LinkedIn profile.
footer.safety.trust.l3.title: Live Verified
footer.safety.trust.l3.desc: Proof of access to the property via live AI check.
footer.safety.trust.l4.title: Identity Check
footer.safety.trust.l4.desc: Full identity check via official documents.
stories.modal.title: Success Stories
stories.anouk.title: From 'hospitable stress' to vegan lasagna evenings
stories.anouk.content:
Anouk (24) was completely done with it. Her fifth 'hospiteren' (introduction) evening of the week ended in a crowded apartment with thirty other candidates, where she had three minutes to prove she was "the fun one". She was tired, hungry, and couldn't see the forest for the housing trees.

Then she discovered Co-Match. "I filled in my Living DNA and was honest: yes, I'm a morning person, but I also love a tidy counter," she says. The app spat out a match of 92%. She swiped right and… bingo!

The AI report told her that she was on the same page as the residents of 'Huize de Boterbloem' in almost every area, except they still needed to talk about weekly cleaning. "That felt so human," she laughs. She sent an icebreaker about their shared obsession with vegan lasagna. Two days later, she was on their roof terrace, wine in hand, chatting away under the stars. No stress, no three-minute pitch. Just... the click. She's been living there for three months now, and yes, the lasagna evenings are now legendary.
stories.mark.title: My apartment in the sun, my plants in good hands
stories.mark.content:
When Mark (32) heard he could go to Singapore for nine months for work, panic struck. What should he do with his apartment in Utrecht? Airbnb felt too impersonal, and he preferred not to have his interior become a sort of 'traveler hotel'. Moreover: who would water his Bonsai trees? Those trees were like children to him.

He listed his home on Co-Match as 'House Sitting'. He filled in: "Looking for someone who won't let my plants die and who won't invite the whole neighborhood for a rave on Tuesday."

Within a week, he had a match with Sarah, a freelance graphic designer who had just returned from six months of travel and was seeking peace to work on her portfolio. Mark's 'trust level' gave Sarah immediate peace of mind. They met via chat at a coffee shop around the corner. "I actually only asked her how she drank her coffee," Mark says. "That was my 'vibe check'. She turned out to have her own espresso machine that was better than mine. Then I knew: she's going to save my house and my plants."

Mark is in Singapore now and receives a photo of his Bonsai 'forest' in his inbox every week. No worries, no hassle, and an apartment that feels like a home instead of a vacant building.
how_it_works.modal.title: How Co-Match Works
how_it_works.teaser.title: How it works
how_it_works.teaser.subtitle: Find the perfect match based on lifestyle, values, and personality.
how_it_works.provider.title: You have a space, we have the match
how_it_works.provider.intro: Whether you're sharing a room, renting out your house for six months, or looking for a new housemate: Co-Match is all about the click.
how_it_works.provider.step1.title: Step 1: Create your property profile
how_it_works.provider.step1.desc1: Tell us who you are and what you offer. Choose your housing type, upload atmospheric photos, and fill in specifications.
how_it_works.provider.step1.desc2: Tell us about your property and the profile that fits you best. This is the basis for our match score.
how_it_works.provider.step1.desc3: Your personal introduction: Tell us what makes your place special and what type of person you're looking for.
how_it_works.provider.step2.title: Step 2: We do the legwork, you stay in control
how_it_works.provider.step2.desc1: Seekers swipe on your property based on their Living DNA and your specifications.
how_it_works.provider.step2.desc2: Self-limit: Specify the maximum number of matches/messages you want to receive to keep your inbox organized.
how_it_works.provider.step2.desc3: We keep you informed: As soon as there's a high-scoring match, you'll get a notification.
how_it_works.provider.step3.title: Step 3: Matching & Meeting
how_it_works.provider.step3.desc1: Upon a 'match', a secure chat is created to ask questions and schedule a meeting.
how_it_works.provider.step3.desc2: Safety first: You remain anonymous until you decide to share your contact details.
how_it_works.provider.types.title: Which type of offer do you choose?
how_it_works.provider.types.cohousing: Cohousing / Living Group: A room in a shared home or project.
how_it_works.provider.types.hospita: Homestay: You live there yourself and search for one or more housemates.
how_it_works.provider.types.sublet: Holiday Home / Sublet: Available for shorter periods (min. 1 month).
how_it_works.provider.types.expat: House Sitting / Expat: Away for a longer time (6+ months).
how_it_works.provider.types.free: Regular Rental: An independent property for regular rental.
how_it_works.provider.costs.title: Cost Overview
how_it_works.provider.costs.free: As a property provider, you pay nothing at all for up to 3 properties!
how_it_works.provider.costs.trust: Maintain a good trust level (1 to 4); the higher it is, the more certainty for the home seeker.
how_it_works.provider.costs.premium: Do you want to post more than 3 properties? Then you pay a one-time fee of 25 credits per 3 extra properties.
how_it_works.provider.control.title: Why you stay in control
how_it_works.provider.control.double_mat: Interactive chat, with potential meeting points, easy and clear.
how_it_works.provider.control.pause: Pause: Put your listing on 'pause' with one click if you have enough responses.
how_it_works.provider.control.block: Blocking: Easily end a chat if there's no connection.
how_it_works.provider.tip.title: Tip for providers
how_it_works.provider.tip.body: People choose people. Use your intro text not only for rules, but also for the atmosphere. What is the 'vibe' in the house?
how_it_works.seeker.title: Finally find a place that truly fits you
how_it_works.seeker.intro: Without having to send hundreds of impersonal emails. At Co-Match, it's all about your ideal match.
how_it_works.seeker.step1.title: Step 1: Your Living DNA & Profile
how_it_works.seeker.step1.desc2: Your Personal Introduction: Write a short, fun text about yourself. Who are you and why are you the ideal housemate?
how_it_works.seeker.step2.title: Step 2: Choose your way of searching
how_it_works.seeker.step2.desc1: Vibe-Matching (Swipe): Dive into our Tinder-style discovery mode. Fast, visual, and intuitive.
how_it_works.seeker.step2.desc2: Quiet Search: Use our filters and distance table for targeted searches.
how_it_works.seeker.step2.desc3: Inspiration: Be surprised by homes that perfectly match your DNA, even if you wouldn't have found them yourself.
how_it_works.seeker.step3.title: Step 3: Match, Deepen & Contact
how_it_works.seeker.step3.desc1: Our AI Match Report helps you with a deep analysis of the match with similarities and talking points for your first contact.
how_it_works.seeker.step3.desc2: Anonymous details: View all specifications completely anonymously. You don't have to reveal anything yet.
how_it_works.seeker.step3.desc3: Safe contact: Only start the chat when you're ready. You decide when to share private details.
how_it_works.seeker.types.title: What kind of home are you looking for?
how_it_works.seeker.types.cohousing: Cohousing / Living Group: Living together and sharing facilities with like-minded people.
how_it_works.seeker.types.hospita: Homestay: Your own living space with a host / landlord.
how_it_works.seeker.types.sublet: Holiday Home / Sublet: A flexible period of 1 to 6 months.
how_it_works.seeker.types.expat: House Sitting / Expat: You are looking for a temporary home (6+ months).
how_it_works.seeker.types.free: Regular Rental: An independent property without fuss.
how_it_works.seeker.features.title: Fast, clear & perfect matching
how_it_works.seeker.features.factor: Match factor: Instantly see how well a home fits your DNA.
how_it_works.seeker.features.ghosting: No exchange of personal data by Co-Match, you are in control.
how_it_works.seeker.costs.title: Cost Overview (Seekers)
how_it_works.seeker.costs.free: Profile creation, searching, swiping, and general matching are all free.
how_it_works.seeker.costs.premium: Premium options (Optional): Do you want to see all the details of a property, a detailed AI match report including suggestions, or get in touch with the provider via chat (safe/anonymous)? Then we ask for a one-time contribution of 25 credits.
how_it_works.seeker.control.title: Your safety, your control
how_it_works.seeker.control.desc: You're in charge. Only share your details when you feel 100% comfortable. Use our secure chat and meet safely.

prop.editor.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear the entire text?
prop.editor.edit_photo_desc: Drag the frame to crop the photo
prop.editor.example.1.text:
Hi! We are Anne (26) and Karlijn (25) and are looking for a 3rd housemate starting July 1st, Stationsbuurt-Noord region in Ghent!

We live in a duplex apartment with a shared living room, kitchen, and bathroom, and we have a small terrace. Good to know: unfortunately, we don't have a washing machine. There are no house obligations, but we enjoy sitting together occasionally. We value a homey feeling!

A bit about ourselves:

Hello! I'm Anne, 26 years old, and I'm currently in the preparatory program for an HR degree, master's next year :)). In my free time, I like to exercise (running, bouldering, kickboxing), go to concerts or shows, and can be found anywhere and everywhere with friends. Besides that, I work in a café and restaurant here in Ghent!

Hi! I'm Karlijn, 25 years old, and I study Law (3rd bachelor and first master). I'm mostly busy with school, but in my free time, I love dancing, enjoying music and theater performances, or hanging out with my friends!

We are looking for a woman around our age who values a clean house and is a non-smoker. Registration (domicile) is allowed but not required! Pets are not allowed.
prop.editor.example.1.title: Example 1: Cozy house in Ghent (Women)
prop.editor.example.2.text:
Hey!
We are looking for a new housemate to join our cozy apartment. Currently, two of us live here.

Me: Marlou, 25 years old and working at the CLB.

Frank: 30 years old and working at a software company in Ghent.

Who are we looking for?
✨ A social, tidy, and friendly person.
✨ Age: preferably mid-late 20s.
✨ Someone who works.

What do we offer?
🏡 A spacious, modern 2-story apartment.
🍽️ Shared kitchen & living room.
🚪 Cozy bedroom with a terrace. ☀️
🛁 There are 2 bathrooms, the largest of which will be shared between you and Frank.

🫶 Great housemates to chat with, but also room for everyone's own life and privacy.
prop.editor.example.2.title: Example 2: Working home in Ghent
prop.editor.example.3.text:
Hello! A room is becoming available in our student house in Brussels (Ixelles). We are 4 students and looking for an enthusiastic 5th person!

Shared kitchen and 2 bathrooms. We often eat together and sometimes go out together, but everyone has their own life. Ideal for someone who loves sociability!
prop.editor.example.3.title: Example 3: Student house in Brussels
prop.editor.example.title: Examples

seeker.ideal_location_desc: Click on the map or search for a location to center your search.
seeker.intro_privacy_note: Note: Do not mention phone numbers or email addresses to protect your privacy.
seeker.intro_tip_desc: Landlords like to know who their future tenant is. Tell something about your hobbies or work.
seeker.introduction_placeholder: Hi! I am... and I am looking for a nice place because...
seeker.label_city_search: City or Village you are searching in
seeker.modal_desc: To contact providers, your profile must be complete. This significantly increases your chances of finding a home!
seeker.no_favorites: You have no favorites saved yet.
seeker.photo_crop_desc: Make sure your face is clearly visible
seeker.photo_desc: A photo increases trust with landlords.
seeker.placeholder_intro: Hi! I am... and I am looking for a nice place because...
seeker.placeholder_notes: Are there any other specific wishes or things we should know?
seeker.subtitle: Answer more options for a higher matching score
seeker.intro_desc: Landlords like to know who their future tenant is. Tell something about your hobbies or work.
seeker.title: Your Seeker Profile
seeker.toast_minimal_required: Please complete your basic profile to 100% first
settings.currency_native_desc: Show prices in local currency next to your chosen currency
settings.newsletter_desc: Receive the latest co-match magic and property updates in your inbox every week.
settings.chat_mail_alert_desc: Receive a friendly email instantly as soon as new chat messages arrive from your Co-Match properties.
settings.smart_match_alert_desc: Receive an email update as soon as a new perfect match is listed based on your personal profile.
settings.smart_match_alert_hour_hint: Your matchmaker automatically checks the database at {{hour}}:00 CET.
settings.title: Settings
settings.provider_question: When would you as a provider like to receive an email for incoming chats?
settings.opt_only_first_chat_ever_title: 1. Very first response to your property
settings.opt_only_first_chat_ever_desc: Only an email notification for the very first chat message from a home seeker on your property (one-time per property).
settings.opt_each_seeker_first_chat_titl: 2. First interaction from each new candidate
settings.opt_each_seeker_first_chat_desc: Receive an email on the first chat of the first, second, and all subsequent unique home seekers.
settings.opt_always_title: 3. Always on every new chat message
settings.opt_always_desc: Always receive an email notification instantly on every new chat message (guarded by a 15-minute filter).
admin.msg.header_desc: Manage the message boxes that appear at the top of users' screens or set the application to Freeze status. All times are entered in CET.
admin.freeze.title: Stop Application (Freeze)
admin.freeze.subtitle: Total block of the application
admin.freeze.live_desc: The application is blocked for all regular users.
admin.freeze.duration_desc: Leave blank to freeze the application indefinitely. Use the 'HH:MM' format (for example: '02:30' or '24:00').
admin.freeze.placeholder: The website is temporarily offline for scheduled maintenance. We will be back soon!
admin.freeze.warning_desc: Once this Freeze is active and the start time is reached/exceeded, users cannot operate the app. A blur overlay instantly covers the entire screen and cannot be closed. This also applies to active sessions that are already open.
admin.newsletter.intro_desc: Generate a weekly email newsletter based on the latest features and the 10 most recently added properties on Co-Match. The AI writes the introduction, structures features by target group, and designs a ready-to-use responsive HTML mail.
admin.smartmatch.desc: Manage and test the intelligent Smart Match Alert feature and chat notification emails. The hourly cron job scans active seekers, and providers send direct emails for chats. Both types are logged below.
verification.camera_address_label: Which address is on the letter? (For AI matching)
verification.camera_desc: Take a live photo of a utility bill, purchase/rental contract, or municipal letter. Note: Place the document on a table or counter in the home with some of surroundings visible to block deep-fakes and screen photos. The photo is NOT stored, only analyzed live.
verification.camera_scanning_desc: Liveness check, 3D depth scan & OCR running...
verification.camera_success_desc: Your document meets all anti-fraud requirements.
verification.desc: We prevent fraud by requiring housing providers to prove their reliability. The higher the level, the safer your choice.
verification.ladder_intro_desc: Properties from verified providers are viewed up to 4x more often. The higher you climb the Trust Ladder, the greater your chance of serious tenants.
verification.level1.desc: Registered via a verified Google account (Gmail). This is the foundation.
verification.level1.name: Standard
verification.level2.desc: Business or professional identity linked to Co-Match with LinkedIn. Reduced fake-account probability.
verification.level2.name: Professional
verification.level3.desc: Has proven live access to the property/invoices via the app with AI anti-fraud check.
verification.level3.name: Live Verified
verification.level4.desc: Goal: Legal certainty (long-term). Method: Official ID scan (passport/ID card) via Stripe Identity. (Coming later).
verification.level4.name: Identity Check 🛡️
verification.linkedin_desc: Place the link to your public LinkedIn profile. Our AI briefly analyzes credibility (work experience, number of connections). Make sure your profile is public.
verification.linkedin_success_msg: Your LinkedIn profile has been successfully verified! This information is now also securely stored for our administration's review.
verification.title: The Trust Ladder
vibe.all_viewed_desc: Adjust your filters or radius in your profile to discover more homes.
vibe.fill_profile_desc: You need to have minimally filled out your profile to access the Tinder-style swiper, as the Vibe Match completely depends on your data.
vibe.no_homes_desc: There are currently no homes available that match your criteria directly. Change your profile: adjust your region, budget, or property type to see more results.
vibe.title: HouseVibe
vision.desc: We believe a great home starts with the right people. That's why we focus on matches that truly work, based on more than just budget.
vision.title: Why Co-Match?
workflow.meet_provider: Get to know the housing provider(s)
workflow.description_unlocked: Discover this property, create an AI matching report, or get in touch with the provider. Have fun!
workflow.title: You are interested in this property!
workflow.description_old: Unlock this property to gain direct access to all protected details, read the extensive AI match report, and get in direct contact with the provider.
workflow.description_steps: Great news, you've found a potential match! To get the most out of Co-Match and increase your chances of a successful connection, we've set up a natural step-by-step plan for you. Start by discovering all the details in step 1, then dive into step 2 for your personalized AI match report (so you know exactly why this is your ideal spot), and use those insights in step 3 to reach out confidently to the provider. This way, you're perfectly prepared for your first introduction. Good luck!

admin_gifts.title: Feature Gift Box (Management)
admin_gifts.description: Turn traditional software updates into an interactive "unboxing" experience. Create premium gift cards here with rich text, images/GIFs and drop times to immediately catch the attention of active users!
admin_gifts.active_gifts_desc: Overview of active and scheduled updates for your users
admin_gifts.no_gifts_found: No gifts found matching your search.
admin_gifts.edit_desc: Adjust the properties of this update
admin_gifts.placeholder_title: E.g: Live Video Meetings are here! 🎥
admin_gifts.placeholder_message: Give your users a fun and concise explanation about the new feature. Paragraphs and emoticons provide great styling!
admin_gifts.tip_image: Tip: Add an interactive screenshot or GIF to make it visually clear immediately!
admin_gifts.high_priority_desc1: Automatically skips the unboxing animation and lets the Gift Box
admin_gifts.delete_confirm_desc1: Are you absolutely sure you want to permanently delete the gift
admin_gifts.error_required: Please fill in all required fields!

weeklyHighlight.desc: As a property provider, you can have your listing featured in our Weekly Digest email and on the homepage. This attracts many more interested co-housing partners!
weeklyHighlight.spots_remaining: {{available}} of {{total}} spots are still available for the week of {{date}}.
weeklyHighlight.all_full_title: All {{total}} spots for the coming week are already taken!
weeklyHighlight.all_full_desc: New opportunities open again next week. Spots for the following week become available from: {{date}} at 0:00 CET.
weeklyHighlight.already_active_desc: You already have a property highlighted for the week of {{date}}:
weeklyHighlight.already_active_hint: You can highlight at most 1 property per week in the digest. In your dashboard, this property is marked with an orange tag.
weeklyHighlight.cannot_apply_full: You cannot register a property right now because all {{total}} spots for the coming week are taken. Try again when the new week starts!
weeklyHighlight.no_properties: You currently have no available properties to highlight. Create a property first or set your listings to "available".
weeklyHighlight.insufficient_desc: You need at least {{credits}} credits. Click below to top up your credits.
weeklyHighlight.toast_already_highlighte: You already selected a property for the coming week.
weeklyHighlight.toast_all_full: Sorry, all spots are already booked.
